name: create_refund
description: Issue a full or partial refund on a completed Mollie payment. You must specify the payment ID and the amount to refund. The refund is processed asynchronously; use the returned refund ID to track its status.

parameters.name: paymentId
parameters.description: The ID of the payment to refund (path parameter, starts with 'tr_').

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: The amount to refund. An object with 'currency' and 'value'. Must not exceed the remaining refundable amount.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: A description for the refund, visible internally.

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: Custom metadata to attach to the refund.
